title: Ancient Elements™ Calming Bites™ for Dogs
body_html:
To keep Fido feeling cool during everyday stressors, the premium ingredients Ancient Elements Calming Bites can keep your dog settled down. This functional dog supplement features Suntheanine, an advanced form of L-Theanine along with Sensoril Ashwagandha. Together, these advanced ingredients help support relaxation, calmness, and composure for your canine pet.

  • Calming Support for Your Pup! - These delicious premium chewables may help dogs with normal stress, nervousness, and hyperactivity to help them stay calm, comfy, happy, and at ease!
  • Featuring Suntheanine - Every chew contains Suntheanine, a clinically studied and super premium form of L-Theanine that helps promote a sense of relaxation and calmness for your pup.
  • Includes Ashwagandha - This adaptogen may promote relaxation and help any small, medium, or large dogs cope with normal external stresses.
  • Helps Dogs with Normal Stress - Calming Bites help support dogs with normal stress, plus nervous and hyperactive behavior for storms, car rides, firework displays, and more.
  • Treat Your Pup to Pawsome Ingredients - Valerian Root, Organic Hemp Seed Powder, Organic Passionflower, Magnesium Citrate, L-Tryptophan, and Organic Ginger Root for additional calming support for Fido

title: Puppy Allergy & Immune Bites
body_html:
The key to a Zesty life is a healthy immune system, so start your puppy off on the right paw with our Puppy Allergy & Immune Bites! These chews are made with EpiCor Pets, Colostrum, Astragalus Root, and a Gut Health Blend. These ingredients help provide seasonal allergy support, along with supporting the immune system and normal gut flora. These chews may also help maintain normal histamine levels for small canine pets, no matter the breed.

Plus, we know your puppy is already anti bad flavors. So best of all, these chews taste amazing (trust us, we have a hot spot where official four-legged testers tell us), which will give your pup an itch for more, and you'll enjoy the daily relief of giving your pup the best solution for their gut and immune function! Fido will feel spoiled well with max special treatment to keep feeling good and zesty, which treats you to even more fun and fond memories that they're itching to give. Then, when your puppy turns 1, ramp up the fun and try our Allergy & Immune Bites or Allergy & Immune Mini Bites for small breeds to keep them Zesty for years to come!

title: Zesty Paws & Solid Gold Calm & Wellness Bundle for Cats
body_html:
In this kit: Zesty Paws 30 Day Cat Pheromones Calming Diffuser Plug-in Starter Kit + Solid Gold Wet Food Variety Pack Pate & Shreds in Gravy 3oz/12ct - Cat Supplies Bundle for Cats with Stress and Picky Eaters

Zesty Zen for Your Feline Favorite
Support your cat’s well-being from the inside out. This starter kit combines the cat anxiety relief of Zesty Paws cat pheremone diffuser with the premium, holistic nutrition of Solid Gold canned cat food for a happy, healthy, and relaxed pet.

Calming Support
Zesty Paws pheremone diffuser to calm cats reduce stress-related behaviors like urine spraying, scratching, and hiding. The Zesty Paws 30-day diffuser mimics natural feline pheromones, creating a soothing environment that helps multi-cat households and anxious pets feel safe and secure.

Texture and Flavor Variety
Stop the mealtime struggle with a 12-pack of Solid Gold’s fan-favorite grain free cat food recipes. Featuring a mix of gourmet wet cat food pate and seafood shreds in gravy, this variety pack provides the high-protein rotation picky cats crave.

Digestive and Immune Health
Fuel your cat with grain-free, gluten-free wet cat food canned nutrition. Every Solid Gold meal is packed with functional superfoods and omega fatty acids to support sensitive stomachs, skin & coat while boosting overall immune function - all the healthy cat necessities.

Stress Free Setup & Feeding
Everything you need for a peaceful home in one package. Simply plug in the Zesty Paws cat diffuser calming for continuous 30-day support and serve the easy-to-open 3oz cans as a complete meal or a delicious topper to upgrade any kibble diet.

title: Zesty Paws & Solid Gold Wellness Boost Bundle for Dogs
body_html:
In this kit: Zesty Paws Wild Alaskan Omega-3 Blend Pollock & Salmon Oil for Dogs 8.5oz + Solid Gold Beef Dog Bone Broth 8oz/6ct - Skin, Coat & Joint Supplement for Dogs - Dog Supplies Bundle for Picky Eaters

Complete Skin & Coat Wellness
Help your pet shine with the combined power of Zesty Paws Wild Alaskan Salmon Oil and Pollock Oil. Packed with EPA and DHA Omega 3 for dogs, this liquid supplement helps with itch relief for dogs and promotes a soft coat for both dogs and cats.

Enhanced Joint & Heart Support
This dog products bundle targets mobility from two angles. The Solid Gold Beef Bone Broth supports gut and joint health with collagen for dogs, while the high concentration of Omega-3s in the fish oil for dogs formula aids in maintaining heart function and joint flexibility.

Irresistible Mealtime Topper
Transform boring kibble into a gourmet feast! The savory Solid Gold Beef Bone Broth and the mouthwatering Salmon Oil blend are perfect food toppers for picky dogs, providing a boost of natural flavor that encourages your pet to finish every bite of their meal.

Limited Ingredient & Nutrient Dense
Both products prioritize purity and quality. The bone broth features a simple, human-grade recipe designed for sensitive stomachs, while the sustainably sourced fish oil provides essential nutrients without the mess or hassle of pills and capsules.

Easy-to-use Pump & Pour Formula
Simplify your pet's routine with these convenient dog food toppers. Simply add a few pumps of the Omega-3 blend and a splash of the beef bone broth directly onto their food for a daily dose of vitamins, minerals, and essential fats.

title: Flea & Tick Shampoo + Spray | Bundle for Dogs
Hairball + Calming + Allergy & Immune | Bundle for Cats
body_html:
Hairball Bites™ for Cats

Of all the things your cat loves, it's only natural that hairballs probably aren’t one of them. That’s why Zesty Paws created Hairball Bites, a premium bitesized soft chew that may help minimize hairball formation, while also supporting skin and digestive health for your favorite feline. Each chew features AlaskOmega Fish Oil, which provides a source of Omega-3 fatty acids that may minimize hairball formation and also support skin health, along with Psyllium Husk, Zinc, and Mineral Oil for additional hairball and skin support.

Calming Bites™ for Cats

Zesty Paws Calming Bites are premium chewables that aid cats with normal stress, nervousness, and hyperactivity to help them stay calm and at ease. This functional cat supplement features Suntheanine, an advanced form of L-Theanine to support relaxation and calmness for your feline pet. Plus, these soft chews also include Thiamine, L-Tryptophan, Chamomile, and Melatonin for additional support to help calm and relax your kitty companion.

Allergy & Immune Bites™ for Cats

If your feline friend's immune system would like some extra TLC, Allergy & Immune Bites can help! Featuring L Lysine, EpiCor, Astragalus Root, and Quercetin, these bacon flavored chewables are a great way to support immune function. Best of all, pets love the delicious taste (trust us, we have a hot spot where official four-legged testers tell us) that’ll give your cat an itch for more. They’ll feel spoiled with special treatment that'll keep them feeling zesty, which treats you to a big sigh of relief and even more fun memories!

title: 8-in-1 Multivitamin + Turmeric Curcumin | Bundles for Dogs
body_html:
8-in-1 Multivitamin Bites
Finding great multivitamin support that can help care for your dog can be a real pain. But, Zesty Paws is here to make finding pawsome multivitamin products easy! 8-in-1 Multivitamin Bites are nutritional supplements that support hips and joints, heart health, skin and coat, digestion, the immune system, antioxidant activity, liver health, and performance for adult and senior dogs.  Best of all, these bite-sized doggie chewables taste delicious (trust us, we have a hot spot where official four-legged testers tell us) that’ll give pets an itch for more, and pet parents can let out a sigh of daily relief knowing that their canine companion will get multivitamins to keep them feeling Zesty and happy!

Turmeric Curcumin Bites™ for Dogs
Our Turmeric Curcumin Bites are soft chews that contain Turmeric, BioPerine, and Coconut Oil to support mobility, gut health, liver function, and heart health for dogs – small, medium, or large... and for all ages and breeds!

This functional chewable dog supplement features Turmeric with pawsome curcuminoids that provide joint, digestive, immune, cardiovascular, and liver support for your bestie. Plus, each chewable also includes BioPerine, a patented and clinically studied black pepper extract that may help with Curcumin absorption.

Best of all, pets love the delicious taste! That means your pup will get to enjoy the flavors they love while you get to enjoy a sigh of relief knowing you’re spoiling your pup with special treatment to keep them feeling Zesty.

title: Allergy & Immune + Probiotics | Bundle for Dogs
body_html:
Allergy & Immune Bites for Dogs

We know that a lot of pet parents care about their pup's immune function, skin health, and seasonal allergies. So, it's only natural that you would want to find a way to give them some aid to feel the pure relief of keeping your dog feeling Zesty.

That's why Zesty Paws Allergy & Immune Bites are made with EpiCor Pets, Colostrum, Astragalus Root, and a six-strain Gut Health Blend. The ingredients in this soft chew formula provide seasonal allergy support, along with supporting the immune system and normal gut flora. These chews may also help maintain normal histamine levels for canine pets, no matter the breed and for all ages.

Plus, we know your pet is anti bad flavors. So best of all, this chewable tastes amazing (trust us, we have a hot spot where official four-legged testers tell us), which will give Fido an itch for more, and you'll enjoy the daily relief of giving your pup a great option for their gut and immune function, along with not having to deal with giving your dog big pills or tablets! Fido will feel spoiled well with max special treatment to keep feeling good and zesty, which treats you to even more fun and fond memories that they're itching to give!

Probiotic Bites

It's only natural that chowing down should be a fun part of your doggie's day. That's why pet parents like you want to aid your dog's wellness and digestive health to keep their stomach feeling Zesty! But... don't be upset! Instead, stop and rest easy because Zesty Paws is here to give pet parents like you a boost with Probiotic Bites, a soft chew supplement that will help you care for Fido's tummy.

Each amazing chewable is made with six strains of probiotics (including DE111, a clinically studied Bacillus subtilis probiotic) to support gut health and immunity for canine pets. You’ll enjoy the daily relief of giving your pup a great product for their gut and immune function. Plus, let's just say that we know your dog is "anti-bad flavors." So best of all, your dog will feel spoiled with special treatment thanks to Probiotic Bites' good taste that hits the spot instead of being stuck with not-so tasty pills, powder, capsules, or tablets. Well, that's sure worth wagging a tail about!
